'''vatate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yawningly|yawningly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-t-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yawningly|yawningly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vatate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vatate|vatate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vatatesher|vatatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vatatesherĂ«m|vatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vatatero|vatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vatateshĂ«|vatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vatateshĂ«m|vatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivatatero|gokivatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivatateshĂ«|gokivatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivatateshĂ«m|gokivatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govatankerom|govatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govatankeshĂ«|govatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govatankeshĂ«m|govatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govatankeya|govatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vataterom|vataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vatatemu|vatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vatateya|vatateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivataterom|gokivataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivatatemu|gokivatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivatateya|gokivatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vatatate|vatatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vatatatesher|vatatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vatatatesherĂ«m|vatatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vatatatero|vatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vatatateshĂ«|vatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vatatateshĂ«m|vatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivatatatero|gokivatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivatatateshĂ«|gokivatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivatatateshĂ«m|gokivatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govatatankerom|govatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govatatankeshĂ«|govatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govatatankeshĂ«m|govatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govatatankeya|govatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vatataterom|vatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vatatatemu|vatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vatatateya|vatatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivatataterom|gokivatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivatatatemu|gokivatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivatatateya|gokivatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠtĂŠte|vĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠtĂŠtesher|vĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠtĂŠtero|vĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠtĂŠtero|gokivĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠtĂŠnkerom|govĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠtĂŠnkeya|govĂŠtĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠtĂŠterom|vĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠtĂŠtemu|vĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠtĂŠteya|vĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠtĂŠterom|gokivĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠtĂŠteya|gokivĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vaftafte|vaftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vaftaftesher|vaftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vaftaftesherĂ«m|vaftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vaftaftero|vaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vaftafteshĂ«|vaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vaftafteshĂ«m|vaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivaftaftero|gokivaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivaftafteshĂ«|gokivaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivaftafteshĂ«m|gokivaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govaftafnkerom|govaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govaftafnkeshĂ«|govaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govaftafnkeshĂ«m|govaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govaftafnkeya|govaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vaftafterom|vaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vaftaftemu|vaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vaftafteya|vaftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivaftafterom|gokivaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivaftaftemu|gokivaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivaftafteya|gokivaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
